name: Ironclad
h1: Build AI agents that work with Ironclad
metaTitle: Build Ironclad AI agents with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Use DocsBot Skill Builder to create AI support agents and internal assistants that safely look up contract data, trigger workflows, summarize status, and prepare handoffs in Ironclad.
intro: Ironclad is used to manage legal workflows, contracts, approvals, and related records across the business. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the outcome you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a secure reusable Skill that lets your AI agent work with Ironclad. That gives support teams, customer success teams, legal operations, and internal employees an AI agent that can answer questions, retrieve contract context, trigger approved actions, and prepare clean handoffs without leaving chat.
supportUseCases: Use a customer-facing DocsBot agent to look up contract or agreement status in Ironclad and explain the current step, pending approvers, or next expected milestone to a customer.
Let a support agent summarize key contract details from Ironclad, such as renewal timing, signature status, or requested redlines, when responding to a helpdesk ticket.
Have the agent collect missing information from the customer in chat and create or update an approved workflow request in Ironclad for legal or sales follow-up.
Enable the agent to prepare an escalation handoff by pulling the latest Ironclad workflow history and summarizing blockers, owners, and pending actions for a human teammate.
Use the agent to confirm whether a customer request has moved into legal review, signature review, or approval routing and provide a safe status update without exposing restricted terms.
internalUseCases: Employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or an internal chat to retrieve contract status, workflow progress, and approval context from Ironclad without opening the system directly.
Legal, sales, and operations teams can ask the agent to summarize agreement history, highlight pending tasks, and prepare next-step recommendations based on Ironclad records.
Customer success or account teams can use the agent to gather renewal dates, signature progress, or workflow bottlenecks from Ironclad before a customer call or escalation.
Employees can ask the agent to start an approved Ironclad workflow, route a request with the right collected context, or generate a clean internal handoff summary for legal review.
Operations teams can use the agent to follow contract-related SOPs across systems, with the AI retrieving Ironclad details, confirming approvals, and documenting outcomes in a consistent format.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI agent that checks Ironclad contract status and explains the next approval step to customers.
A support workflow that summarizes signature progress and prepares ticket handoffs for legal or account teams.
An internal assistant that retrieves renewal dates, pending approvers, and workflow blockers from Ironclad.
A legal operations bot that starts approved Ironclad workflows after collecting required context in chat.
An AI assistant that generates contract status summaries for Slack, Teams, or helpdesk escalations.
A private employee agent that follows contract request SOPs and routes requests into Ironclad safely.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Ironclad agent to do in plain language, such as checking contract status, summarizing approvals, or starting an approved workflow from a support or internal chat.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable Skill, chooses the safest workflow design, identifies the required configuration values, and defines how the agent should retrieve information or take bounded action in Ironclad.

howItWorks.title: Connections are secured
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder handles secure connection planning by defining authentication and secret handling, keeping credentials out of chats and Skill content, proxying secrets through approved runtime configuration, and scoping access to the minimum records, users, and actions needed.

howItWorks.title: Approvals and limits are added
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds approval boundaries and action limits where needed so sensitive updates, workflow creation, or record changes only happen within the rules your team approves.

howItWorks.title: Scenarios are tested automatically
howItWorks.description: The built-in testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios, checks for bugs, weak instructions, missing permission controls, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated self-improvement loop.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Ironclad?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Ironclad workflow you want in plain language, and Skill Builder designs the Skill, secures the connection, tests scenarios, and prepares it for deployment to a support or internal agent.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Ironclad data to answer customer questions?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use approved Ironclad data to look up workflow status, contract progress, renewal timing, or signature context and then respond with a clear customer-safe summary.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can an AI agent automate with Ironclad?
faq.answer: A DocsBot agent can retrieve contract or approval status, collect missing details, prepare legal handoffs, summarize blockers, and trigger approved follow-up workflows tied to Ironclad records.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees with contract and approval workflows in Ironclad?
faq.answer: Yes, employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve contract context, check pending approvals, summarize workflow history, and start approved requests while following team SOPs.

faq.question: Can DocsBot safely update records or trigger workflows in Ironclad?
faq.answer: DocsBot Skills can be designed for bounded actions such as creating requests, updating allowed fields, or triggering approved workflows, with scoped permissions and approval checkpoints for sensitive steps.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Ironclad access secure for AI agents?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines secure configuration values, keeps secrets out of chat and generated content, proxies authentication through approved runtime settings, and scopes access to the minimum actions and records required.

brand.title: Ironclad
brand.description: Ironclad Performance Wear is a leading apparel company that designs and manufactures high-performance work gloves and hand protection solutions. Founded in 1998, the company has established itself as a pioneer in the safety, construction, and industrial markets, providing task-specific gloves for various industries. With a focus on innovation, advanced materials, and durability, Ironclad's products are available globally through various distributors and retailers.
brand.slogan: Built Tough for the Industrial Athlete
